message.content:
Design a detailed implementation plan for a "Share Profile" feature for the iskrib_v3 app.

## Current State
- Posts already have share support via `/share/post/:journalId` route in `server/server.js` that serves HTML with OG meta tags, and `/share/post/:journalId/image` that generates a 1200x630 JPEG using Sharp
- Profiles have NO server-side share routes yet
- Profile data is available via `getUserByUsernameService(username)` in `server/services/getUserDataService.js` which returns `{ userData: [user], followerCount, followingCount }`
- User fields: `id, name, username, bio, image_url, background, badge, profile_font_color, created_at`
- The `background` field is a JSON object like `{ backgroundImage: "url(...)", backgroundSize: "cover", ... }` or a gradient object
- Client-side SEO exists via `useProfileSeo` hook but social crawlers can't execute JS
- Server utility: `SITE_URL = 'https://iskrib.com'` from `server/utils/urlUtils.js`
- The server uses Sharp for image processing already (used in post share image generation)
- Frontend profile pages: `VisitProfile.jsx` at `/u/:username` and `MyProfile.jsx` at `/profile`

## User's Request
"Share my profile to Facebook or Twitter. When shared, it should show: username, background picture (if exists), profile picture (if exists), and bio."

## What needs to be built

### 1. Server: `/share/u/:username` route
Similar to the existing post share route pattern. This serves pre-rendered HTML with OG meta tags so social media crawlers see rich previews without needing JavaScript. It should:
- Fetch user data via `getUserByUsernameService`
- Set og:title, og:description, og:image, og:url, twitter:card etc.
- og:image should point to `/share/u/:username/image` for the dynamically generated composite image
- Include a JS redirect to the actual profile page `/u/:username`
- Include meta refresh fallback

### 2. Server: `/share/u/:username/image` route
Generates a 1200x630px OG image using Sharp that composites:
- Background image or gradient (if user has one)
- Profile picture (circular, overlaid)
- Username text
- Bio text (truncated)
- Iskryb branding

This should follow similar patterns to the existing post share image generation:
- Safe URL fetching (validate URLs, no private IPs)
- Fallback to default image if generation fails
- Cache headers
- JPEG output (mozjpeg quality 82)

### 3. Frontend: Share button UI
Add a share button on both:
- `MyProfile.jsx` (own profile) — inside `ProfileHeroSection`
- `VisitProfile.jsx` (visited profile)

The share action should:
- Use Web Share API if available (mobile)
- Fallback: copy share URL to clipboard
- The share URL format: `https://iskrib.com/share/u/:username`

## Design Considerations
- The composite OG image generation with Sharp: how to render text + circular avatar + background in a 1200x630 canvas
- Sharp can composite images but text rendering requires SVG overlay approach
- For the background: if it's a `backgroundImage: url(...)` extract the URL; if it's a gradient, render it as SVG
- Profile pic: fetch, resize to circle (rounded corners in Sharp), composite on top
- Text: render username and bio as SVG text, composite onto the image

Provide a detailed technical plan with specific code patterns and file locations.

content.text: I'll start by thoroughly exploring the existing codebase to understand the current patterns, especially the post share implementation, profile data structures, and frontend components.
